Password Security Best Practices (2026):
• Prioritize password length over complexity.
• Mandate passwords with a minimum length of 12 characters.
• Avoid using complexity metrics such as password strength meters.
• Use password managers to securely store and generate complex passwords.
• Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) to add an extra layer of security.
